sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n36967" key="e)caskhte/on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐξασκ-ητέον</orth>, <sense id="n36967.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one must practise,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">σωφροσύνην</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Nicostr.</author> </bibl> </cit> ap. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Stob.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.23.65</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
